_comment: Track manifest for Pledge & Crown audio-to-MIDI transcription. Each entry points at a baked WAV under game/assets/audio/ and lists which Demucs stems to transcribe. The pipeline is Demucs (htdemucs 4-stem split) -> Spotify Basic Pitch (per-stem polyphonic transcription) -> one .mid per stem + a combined .mid, written under tools/audio-to-midi/out/<name>/. The whole point is the per-MIDI note-count/range report so we can see exactly what notes Stable Audio Open chose for each voice (e.g. is the bass actually anchored on B). Defaults transcribe `village` and `epilogue` (the most musical tracks); pass --all to do every track, or --only <names>. Valid stem names are htdemucs's four: bass, drums, other, vocals.
